top_signals.title: Government fraud squad hunts down Covid loan scams
top_signals.summary: A new government counter-fraud squad has launched investigations against those who defrauded the public during the Covid pandemic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Rebound After 10% Rout With Focus Back on Earnings
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks rebounded from a 10% rout, with investors refocusing on chipmakers’ earnings after what many saw as a selloff driven by technical factors.

top_signals.title: Venue of Japan-India summit may be changed to New Delhi
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's stay in India is likely to be brief and tightly scheduled due to her parliamentary duties.
